checks.description: Result must respect the 16‑bit format for all exercised boundary operand pairs.
checks.pass_condition: Upper 8 bits of result equal dividend % divisor and lower 8 bits equal dividend / divisor for each boundary case; result contains no X or Z values when res_valid asserts.
checks.trigger_condition: When a boundary operand pair is applied and res_valid becomes high.

checks.description: Result must be presented in the specified 16‑bit format after a legal operation.
checks.pass_condition: When res_valid transitions high, the upper 8 bits of result equal dividend % divisor and the lower 8 bits equal dividend / divisor for the inputs that were presented with opn_valid.
checks.trigger_condition: When opn_valid is asserted and later res_valid becomes high.
